title: Create+ Unbound
description: A Create addon modpack that has Vanilla++ QoL mods and world generation
body:
# **About this Pack**
This Create modpack is an expansion on the standard create experience with more automation and addons. Includes many mods for QoL and assistance with building, including using schematics(Litematica) and flexible block placement(Tweakaroo). With a whole assortment of things to give you less headaches, you will find your factories coming together faster than before with a familiar vanilla-esk feel.


# Packs Used
Complementary Shaders
[https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound/version/latest](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound/version/latest)

Vanilla Tweaks
[https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

Fresh Animations
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
